# Win/Loss Log

One entry per closed (won, lost, or stalled) opportunity. Run the weekly
Win/Loss review against this log.

## Format

```
## 2026-MM-DD — <Client>
- outcome: won | lost | stalled
- offer: Revenue Sprint | Retainer | Custom
- amount_sar: <number or n/a>
- reason: <one sentence>
- ICP signal: <strong | weak | wrong>
- message that worked / failed: <which angle>
- learning: <one sentence>
- decision: build | fix | kill | defer | continue
```
